text: Potential card PAN. Confirm with a Luhn check downstream.
Health-plan beneficiary number (HIPAA #9) / Medicare Beneficiary Identifier.
US ZIP code (HIPAA #2). Generalize to first 3 digits if population > 20k under Safe Harbor.
Full date (HIPAA #3 — generalize to year for ages < 90).
Ages > 89 are PHI under Safe Harbor (HIPAA #3).

Real hate-slur dictionaries are curated under a separate pack with restricted distribution.
E.164 international phone. False-positive prone — combine with context.

Funds pass through with no apparent economic purpose
85mm focal length compresses background, flattering for faces, typical aperture f/1.4-f/2.8 for shallow depth of field, subject distance 2-3m, narrow field of view (~28 degrees).

text: Structuring (also smurfing) describes the breakdown of large transactions into smaller amounts to avoid currency-transaction reporting thresholds. Indicators include rapid, repeated cash deposits below the reporting threshold across multiple branches or by multiple individuals depositing into a common account.

extra.text: Structuring (also smurfing) describes the breakdown of large transactions into smaller amounts to avoid currency-transaction reporting thresholds. Indicators include rapid, repeated cash deposits below the reporting threshold across multiple branches or by multiple individuals depositing into a common account.

text: Layering through shell entities involves moving funds rapidly across legal vehicles that have no apparent commercial activity. Indicators include same-day onward wires, circular flows between related entities, and minimal economic purpose stated in payment messages.

extra.text: Layering through shell entities involves moving funds rapidly across legal vehicles that have no apparent commercial activity. Indicators include same-day onward wires, circular flows between related entities, and minimal economic purpose stated in payment messages.

text: Trade-based money laundering exploits the trade system through over- or under-invoicing, phantom shipments, and multiple invoicing. Indicators include invoice prices significantly above prevailing market levels for the goods described, or shipments with no corresponding goods movement.

extra.text: Trade-based money laundering exploits the trade system through over- or under-invoicing, phantom shipments, and multiple invoicing. Indicators include invoice prices significantly above prevailing market levels for the goods described, or shipments with no corresponding goods movement.

text: Cross-border flows involving FATF black-list or grey-list jurisdictions warrant enhanced due diligence. Indicators include first-time corridors with no prior account history, payments routed through jurisdictions unrelated to the customer's stated business, and rapid pass-through accounts in high-risk jurisdictions.

extra.text: Cross-border flows involving FATF black-list or grey-list jurisdictions warrant enhanced due diligence. Indicators include first-time corridors with no prior account history, payments routed through jurisdictions unrelated to the customer's stated business, and rapid pass-through accounts in high-risk jurisdictions.

text: Major depressive disorder, single episode, unspecified

extra.label: Major depressive disorder, single episode, unspecified

text: Patients presenting with chest pain suggestive of acute coronary syndrome should receive an ECG within 10 minutes of arrival and troponin testing per institutional protocol. Risk stratification follows the HEART score; admit pathways are defined for high-risk strata.

extra.text: Patients presenting with chest pain suggestive of acute coronary syndrome should receive an ECG within 10 minutes of arrival and troponin testing per institutional protocol. Risk stratification follows the HEART score; admit pathways are defined for high-risk strata.

text: STEMI activation requires ST-segment elevation ≥1 mm in two contiguous leads (≥2 mm in V2–V3) on ECG. Door-to-balloon time goal is 90 minutes for percutaneous coronary intervention.

extra.text: STEMI activation requires ST-segment elevation ≥1 mm in two contiguous leads (≥2 mm in V2–V3) on ECG. Door-to-balloon time goal is 90 minutes for percutaneous coronary intervention.

text: Suspected acute ischemic stroke with onset within 4.5 hours warrants emergent non-contrast head CT and consideration of IV thrombolysis if no contraindications. Large-vessel occlusion may require endovascular thrombectomy up to 24 hours from last known well.

extra.text: Suspected acute ischemic stroke with onset within 4.5 hours warrants emergent non-contrast head CT and consideration of IV thrombolysis if no contraindications. Large-vessel occlusion may require endovascular thrombectomy up to 24 hours from last known well.

text: Thunderclap headache reaching peak intensity within seconds requires emergent non-contrast head CT. If CT is non-diagnostic and the clinical suspicion remains high, lumbar puncture is indicated to evaluate for subarachnoid hemorrhage.

extra.text: Thunderclap headache reaching peak intensity within seconds requires emergent non-contrast head CT. If CT is non-diagnostic and the clinical suspicion remains high, lumbar puncture is indicated to evaluate for subarachnoid hemorrhage.

text: Anaphylaxis with respiratory or circulatory involvement requires intramuscular epinephrine in the anterolateral thigh as first-line treatment, with rapid reassessment. Antihistamines and corticosteroids are adjuncts, not substitutes.

extra.text: Anaphylaxis with respiratory or circulatory involvement requires intramuscular epinephrine in the anterolateral thigh as first-line treatment, with rapid reassessment. Antihistamines and corticosteroids are adjuncts, not substitutes.

text: Third-trimester vaginal bleeding requires immediate obstetric evaluation. Placenta previa and abruption are leading concerns; digital vaginal examination is contraindicated until placental location is known by ultrasound.

extra.text: Third-trimester vaginal bleeding requires immediate obstetric evaluation. Placenta previa and abruption are leading concerns; digital vaginal examination is contraindicated until placental location is known by ultrasound.
